title: Warm Cheesy Filipino Cheese Casserole
description: A creamy, cheesy Filipino dish featuring paprika, perfect for midnight cravings, this ovo-vegetarian friendly casserole is a cultured delight, with a cheese-pull that will satisfy any appetite
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the macaroni according to package instructions until al dente, then set aside.
In a saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the flour and whisk to make a roux, cooking for 1 minute.
Slowly pour in the milk, whisking constantly to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and let simmer until thickened.
Remove the sauce from heat and stir in the cheddar and mozzarella cheese until melted.
Add the paprika, salt, and pepper to the cheese sauce and stir to combine.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked macaroni, cheese sauce, and beaten eggs, stirring until well combined.
Transfer the macaroni mixture to a baking dish and top with additional shredded cheese.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
